patterns.description: Vertica system table
patterns.fix_hint: Replace with information_schema or system table equivalent in Trino

patterns.description: Vertica segmentation clause
patterns.fix_hint: Remove SEGMENTED BY clause - Trino does not support this storage specification

patterns.description: WITH DATA clause at the end of CTAS or table creation statements - not supported in Trino
patterns.fix_hint: Remove the WITH DATA clause. In Trino, CTAS statements automatically populate data; no explicit WITH DATA keyword is needed.

patterns.description: USING clause in JOIN constructions - not supported in Trino; use explicit ON clause with column equality
patterns.fix_hint: Replace USING(column_list) with explicit ON clause, e.g., 'ON t1.column = t2.column'. Ensure all columns from USING are converted to explicit equality conditions.

patterns.description: Vertica PERCENTILE_DISC (exact percentile) – not directly available in Trino
patterns.fix_hint: Replace PERCENTILE_DISC with a subquery using row_number() and ceil/floor as shown in the migration guide (see example in Сравнение синтаксиса).

patterns.description: Vertica temporary table creation
patterns.fix_hint: Remove TEMP/TEMPORARY keywords to create a regular table. Do not specify a schema — the table will be created in the default schema. Keep the table name exactly as in the original Vertica code; optionally you may add a prefix (e.g., tmp_) for clarity, but the name itself must remain unchanged.

patterns.description: Detects usage of 'temporary = true' flag which creates temporary/transient tables instead of persistent ones
patterns.fix_hint: Remove 'temporary = true' parameter to create a regular persistent table. Use standard 'CREATE TABLE table_name AS ...' syntax without temporary flags. Keep the table name exactly as in the original code; optionally you may add a prefix (e.g., tmp_) for clarity, but the name itself must remain unchanged.

patterns.description: Vertica storage table properties are not supported in Trino
patterns.fix_hint: Remove Vertica-only table properties such as appendonly and orientation from the WITH clause. Keep only Trino-supported table properties.

patterns.description: Explicit WITH (format='PARQUET') table property detected
patterns.fix_hint: Remove the explicit format='PARQUET' table property from CTAS/CREATE TABLE statements unless the target Trino environment explicitly requires it. Keep only validated Trino-supported table properties.

patterns.description: Reference to a table in the v_temp_schema schema, which is a Vertica temporary schema not available in Trino
patterns.fix_hint: Remove the 'v_temp_schema.' prefix and refer to the table directly by its name only. The table will be created in the default schema; optionally you may add a prefix (e.g., tmp_) for clarity, but the name itself must remain unchanged.

patterns.description: LAST_DAY function is not supported in Trino; it is used in Vertica to get the last day of the month
patterns.fix_hint: Replace LAST_DAY(column) with a subquery that returns the maximum date for the same table and column, e.g., (SELECT MAX(event_date) FROM table AS alias).

patterns.description: Use of IS FALSE/TRUE or IS NOT FALSE/TRUE for boolean checks, which is not supported in Trino; Trino uses comparison operators =, <> with boolean literals
patterns.fix_hint: Replace 'IS FALSE' with '= FALSE', 'IS TRUE' with '= TRUE', 'IS NOT FALSE' with '<> FALSE', 'IS NOT TRUE' with '<> TRUE'. Ensure the boolean expression is compared directly.

patterns.description: Vertica export
patterns.fix_hint: Remove EXPORT statement - use standard SQL operations

patterns.description: Vertica time series
patterns.fix_hint: Replace with window functions or date sequence generation

patterns.description: Vertica interpolate join (use range join in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace INTERPOLATE join with range join using LEAD() window function

patterns.description: Vertica optimizer hint /*+ ... */
patterns.fix_hint: Remove optimizer hints - Trino does not support /*+ ... */ syntax

patterns.description: Vertica cast operator :: (use CAST() in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace expression::type with CAST(expression AS type)

patterns.description: Date literal as a plain string in a comparison or expression; Trino does not implicitly convert strings to dates, leading to unexpected numeric comparisons
patterns.fix_hint: Wrap the date string in the DATE() function, e.g., DATE('2026-01-01'), to explicitly convert it to a date type. Ensure this is done wherever the literal is used in date comparisons, arithmetic, or function arguments.

patterns.description: Colon-prefixed parameter used without explicit CAST; parameters like :date or :launch must always be cast to the target type in Trino
patterns.fix_hint: Wrap the parameter in a CAST function with the appropriate target type. For dates use CAST(:variable AS date), for integers use CAST(:variable AS bigint), for decimals use CAST(:variable AS decimal), etc. Ensure the type matches the context.

patterns.description: Vertica-specific interval syntax using 'intervalym' keyword detected. Trino requires standard INTERVAL syntax with explicit unit specification.
patterns.fix_hint: Replace 'intervalym' with 'INTERVAL' and reformat to Trino syntax. Example: Change 'maxdate - intervalym '2 month'' to 'maxdate - INTERVAL '2' month'. Ensure interval units are quoted and placed after the numeric value.

patterns.description: Invalid Trino interval literal where the value and unit are placed inside the same quoted string
patterns.fix_hint: Rewrite interval literals to valid Trino syntax: use INTERVAL '1' DAY instead of INTERVAL '1 DAY'.

patterns.description: Vertica DECODE function (use CASE in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace DECODE(expr, val1, result1, ..., default) with CASE expression

patterns.description: Vertica ZEROIFNULL (use COALESCE in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace ZEROIFNULL(expr) with COALESCE(expr, 0)

patterns.description: Vertica NULLIFZERO (use CASE WHEN in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace NULLIFZERO(expr) with NULLIF(expr, 0) or CASE WHEN expr = 0 THEN NULL ELSE expr END

patterns.description: Vertica ISUTF8 (use regex in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace with regex pattern matching for UTF-8 validation

patterns.description: Vertica EXPLODE (use UNNEST in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace EXPLODE(array) with UNNEST(array) AS t(alias)

patterns.description: Vertica IMPLODE (use ARRAY_AGG in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace IMPLODE(...) with ARRAY_AGG(...)

patterns.description: Vertica APPROXIMATE_MEDIAN (use APPROX_PERCENTILE in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace APPROXIMATE_MEDIAN(column) with APPROX_PERCENTILE(column, 0.5)

patterns.description: Vertica APPROXIMATE_PERCENTILE
patterns.fix_hint: Replace with APPROX_PERCENTILE(column, percentile_value)

patterns.description: Vertica TRANSPOSE (use UNNEST with arrays in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace with UNNEST of ARRAY[column_names] and ARRAY[column_values]

patterns.description: Vertica CONDITIONAL_CHANGE_EVENT
patterns.fix_hint: Replace with combination of LAG and SUM window functions

patterns.description: Vertica ILIKE (use LOWER() + LIKE in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace column ILIKE 'pattern' with LOWER(column) LIKE LOWER('pattern')

patterns.description: Vertica TIMESTAMPDIFF (use DATE_DIFF in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace TIMESTAMPDIFF(unit, start, end) with DATE_DIFF(unit, start, end)

patterns.description: Vertica DATEDIFF (use DATE_DIFF in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace DATEDIFF(unit, start, end) with DATE_DIFF(unit, start, end)

patterns.description: Vertica USING PARAMETERS clause
patterns.fix_hint: Remove USING PARAMETERS clause - not supported in Trino

patterns.description: Vertica GROUP_CONCAT (use ARRAY_JOIN in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace GROUP_CONCAT(col) with ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(col), separator)

patterns.description: OFFSET ... ROWS syntax (Vertica specific, use OFFSET ... in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Remove ROWS keyword - use OFFSET N only

patterns.description: Vertica QUALIFY (use WHERE on window functions in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace QUALIFY with subquery containing WHERE on window function result

patterns.description: Deleting data in Trino is forbidden
patterns.fix_hint: Deleting data in Trino is forbidden. Prefer a partition-bounded overwrite strategy instead. Add a session statement only when your local catalog requires one, and keep the INSERT scoped to the affected partition window.

patterns.description: NUMERIC type (use DECIMAL in Trino)
patterns.fix_hint: Replace NUMERIC or NUMERIC(p,s) with DECIMAL or DECIMAL(p,s)

patterns.description: version_id must not be present in Trino SQL
patterns.fix_hint: Remove version_id from Trino DDL, INSERT column lists, SELECT lists, @store queries, partitioning and filters.
